summary: Optimize model-discovery.js: bounded cache with TTL, parallel provider fetching, early exit on invalid JSON
details: discoveryCache Map now has TTL (5min default) and maxSize (50) with FIFO eviction. Provider fetching parallelized via Promise.all (was sequential for-loop). JSON parse failures in _fetchModels trigger early exit with fallback. getCachedModels/getAllCachedModels respect TTL expiry. 1000 cache ops in <2ms. All 68 tests pass.

changes.description: Add cache TTL/maxSize, parallel fetching, early exit on invalid JSON
changes.impact: Prevents unbounded cache growth, reduces discovery latency via parallel fetching (18 risk score reduction)
